Tier 2 — Bottlenecks & Decisions

G03 — EthosEnergy ICD not received
Blocks 3 RFQs: Transformer (voltage/MVA spec), Exhaust (flange dims), Electrical Distribution. Cannot finalize without it.
→ tools/flowseer.py icd escalate
G02 — Baker Hughes $340K decision pending
Accept ($340K), negotiate (target ~$310K), or rebid. Quote within market range. PO template generated.
→ tools/contracts/drafts/TWP-2026-0001_VIB_MON_Baker_Hughes.txt
G07 — NM Environmental Permit Scope (CECO Emissions $892K)
NOx/CO limits need NM Environment Dept confirmation before CECO RFQ can be fully specified.
→ Confirm permit limits with NM EPC / regulatory counsel
